recommended_paths: proceed with final proposal; carry low telemetry/component-governance/platform-adaptation notes into TODO
exact_next_step: Record reviewer resolutions in the governing TODO using the machine-checkable resolution table or equivalent gate ledger, then extract the derived resolution packet and decide whether another bounded review pass is still required.

findings.title: Shared component anti-switch guidance needs implementation enforcement
findings.rationale: The proposal says the shared component must not become a business switch, but implementation should enforce this through composition slots/builders.
findings.suggested_action: Implement the shared surface with slots/builders and keep variant business logic in feature-owned builders.

findings.title: Runtime observability should be considered
findings.rationale: The proposal mandates pre-merge tests but does not require telemetry or feature flagging for production monitoring. This is non-blocking because the product is pre-promotion and test gates are strong.
findings.suggested_action: Implementation TODO should consider telemetry for surface shown and action selected, or explicitly defer it.

findings.title: Desktop adaptation details remain to be specified
findings.rationale: The proposal names desktop adaptation but not exact breakpoint/primitive. Existing mandatory runtime checks are sufficient for proposal approval.
findings.suggested_action: Implementation TODO should define breakpoint/form-factor detection and validate desktop mobile-frame behavior.
